description: Strategy games, city builders, tycoon, 4X, tower defense
bootstrap_note: Ad-hoc optional (not in canonical registry — requires user opt-in): map-generation-spec (procedural map/dungeon layout generation rules, tile placement constraints — for 4X/roguelike-lite/city-builder hybrids). Canonical optional guidance: ai-faction-design for 4X/RTS with enemy AI factions; combat-system-design + competitive-balance-design for 4X/tactical games with turn-based or real-time combat; audio-design for games with dynamic music or adaptive soundscapes
